Fonds de soutien relatif aux prets et co.d: Provides support (EUR 3 billion over 15 years) to local authorities and hospitals holding toxic structured financial products (Dexia-era loans).
Fonds de soutien relatif aux prets et co.b: Local authorities and hospitals with toxic structured loans

Service public de l’energie.d: Covers public service obligations (CSPE) for energy: renewable electricity feed-in tariffs, social energy tariffs, island territory energy costs (ZNI), and cogeneration support.
Service public de l’energie.b: Renewable energy producers, island territories, energy-poor households

Participation de l’Etat au desendettemen.d: Principal repayment of EUR 35 billion SNCF Reseau debt (2018 railway reform).

Protection judiciaire de la jeunesse (fo.d: Former programme number for judicial youth protection. Renumbered as programme 182.

Performance et resilience des batiments.d: Funds energy renovation and climate resilience improvements for State buildings and public operators, targeting carbon neutrality of the State’s 100 million sqm portfolio.
Performance et resilience des batiments.b: State building occupants, public operators, energy efficiency sector

Transformation publique.d: Supports digital transformation and modernization of public services through DITP, including user experience improvements, France Services, and administrative simplification.
Transformation publique.b: DITP, public service users, government agencies

Fonds de transformation de l’action publ.d: Competitive fund for innovative public transformation projects. Absorbed into programme 349.

Innovation et transformation numeriques.d: Digital innovation (FranceConnect, data.gouv.fr, DINUM platforms). Absorbed into programme 129.

Administration territoriale de l’Etat.d: Funds the prefectoral network (101 prefectures, 234 sub-prefectures), deconcentrated State services (DDI/DREETS), and 2,700+ France Services access points.
Administration territoriale de l’Etat.b: Prefectures, sub-prefectures, France Services points, citizens

Charge de la dette de SNCF Reseau repris.d: Covers interest charges on EUR 35 billion of SNCF Reseau debt transferred to the State following the 2018 railway reform (Pacte ferroviaire).

Prise en charge par l’Etat du financemen.d: State-guaranteed loans (PGE, EUR 140 billion) and solidarity fund during COVID-19. Crisis programme, closed.

Fonds de solidarite pour les entreprises.d: Direct grants to small businesses during COVID lockdowns. Total: EUR 40 billion.

Renforcement exceptionnel des participat.d: Emergency equity injections to strategic companies (Air France-KLM, EDF, Renault).

Compensation a la Securite sociale - COV.d: Compensated Social Security for COVID employer charge exemptions (EUR 5 billion).

Ecologie.d: Ecology pillar of France Relance (EUR 30 billion recovery plan): building energy renovation, green mobility, biodiversity, circular economy, and green hydrogen investments.
Ecologie.b: Homeowners, public buildings, green transport, biodiversity sector

Competitivite.d: Competitiveness pillar of France Relance: industrial relocation, digital transformation, R&D support (PIA4 precursor), and business competitiveness measures.
Competitivite.b: Industrial firms, SMEs, R&D sector, digital economy

Cohesion.d: Social cohesion pillar of France Relance: 1 jeune 1 solution youth employment, social solidarity, territorial cohesion.

Renforcement des fonds propres de l’Agen.d: Provides equity reinforcement to AFD to support its lending capacity for development cooperation in Africa, Middle East, and Indo-Pacific.

Materiels sanitaires - COVID.d: Emergency purchases of masks, ventilators, tests, PPE. Total: EUR 7 billion.

Chomage partiel - COVID.d: Exceptional partial unemployment (activite partielle) scheme during COVID. Total: EUR 35 billion.

Conduite et pilotage de la transformatio.d: Administrative steering of public transformation policy: coordination, evaluation, and piloting of civil service reform and government modernization projects.

Amortissement de la dette de l’Etat liee.d: Created to amortize EUR 165 billion of exceptional State debt from COVID-19 crisis over 20 years (2022-2042). Transferred to CADES; programme suppressed in LFI 2025.

Restitution des biens mal acquis.d: Channels proceeds from confiscated assets of foreign corrupt leaders (biens mal acquis) back to development projects in the countries of origin.
Restitution des biens mal acquis.b: Populations of countries affected by kleptocracy

France Televisions.d: Provides the annual State allocation to France Televisions (public TV: France 2, France 3, France 5, France Info), approximately EUR 2.5 billion. Successor to programme 841.

ARTE France.d: Annual State allocation to ARTE France, the French-German cultural television channel, approximately EUR 300 million. Successor to programme 842.

France Medias Monde.d: Annual State allocation to France Medias Monde (France 24, RFI, Monte Carlo Doualiya) for international broadcasting, approximately EUR 300 million. Successor to programme 844.

Institut national de l’audiovisuel.d: Annual State allocation to INA for preserving, digitizing, and commercializing France’s audiovisual heritage archives (70+ years), approximately EUR 105 million.

TV5 Monde.d: France’s contribution to TV5 Monde, the multilateral francophone television channel broadcasting in 200+ countries, approximately EUR 85 million.

Reversement a la securite sociale des re.d: Channels EU Recovery and Resilience Facility (FRR) proceeds to Social Security for health investment under the Segur de la sante hospital investment plan.

Fonds d’acceleration de la transition ec.d: Green Fund (Fonds vert) providing EUR 2.5 billion to local authorities for ecological transition projects: building renovation, mobility, biodiversity, and circular economy.
Fonds d’acceleration de la transition ec.b: Local authorities, intercommunal groupings, territorial projects

Allegements du cout du travail en agricu.d: Compensates Social Security for employer social charge exemptions for seasonal agricultural workers (travailleurs occasionnels demandeurs d’emploi agricoles).

France services.d: France Services one-stop-shop network (2,700+ points). Functions absorbed into programme 354.

Programme de transformation.d: Funds digital transformation and modernization projects across public audiovisual companies, including platform development and content innovation.
Programme de transformation.b: Public audiovisual companies (France Televisions, Radio France, etc.)

Fonds de solidarite pour le developpemen.d: Dedicated solidarity fund within ODA for contributions to global health (Global Fund, Gavi, Unitaid), education (GPE), and climate (GCF) initiatives.
Fonds de solidarite pour le developpemen.b: Global Fund, Gavi, Unitaid, GPE, developing countries

Soutien des progres de l’enseignement et.d: France 2030 programme investing in higher education excellence (ExcellencES), university-industry partnerships, and research infrastructure upgrades.
Soutien des progres de l’enseignement et.b: Universities, research laboratories, students in innovative programmes

Acceleration de la modernisation des ent.d: France 2030 programme accelerating industrial modernization through French Tech, industry 4.0, digital technology adoption, and business scale-up support.
Acceleration de la modernisation des ent.b: French Tech startups, industrial firms, BPI France

Financement des investissements strategi.d: Core France 2030 programme (EUR 54 billion total plan) funding strategic investments: semiconductors, quantum computing, green hydrogen, nuclear, health innovation, and space.
Financement des investissements strategi.b: Strategic industries, deep tech firms, SGPI

Financement structurel des ecosystemes d.d: France 2030 programme funding structural support for innovation ecosystems: technology parks, incubators, competitiveness clusters (poles de competitivite), and innovation networks.

Presidence de la Republique.d: Funds the Presidency of the Republic (Elysee Palace operations, presidential staff, security, travel, and communications). Budget approximately EUR 115 million.
Presidence de la Republique.b: President of the Republic, Elysee staff

Assemblee nationale.d: Funds the National Assembly (lower house, 577 deputies) including deputies’ compensation, legislative staff, and Palais Bourbon operations. Budget approximately EUR 600 million.

Senat.d: Funds the Senate (upper house, 348 senators) including senators’ compensation, legislative staff, and Palais du Luxembourg operations. Budget approximately EUR 350 million.

Dotation en faveur des collectivites ter.d: Specific allocations for territorial equalization. Merged into programmes 119 and 122.

Cour de justice de la Republique.d: Funds the special court responsible for trying government ministers for crimes committed in the exercise of their official functions.
Cour de justice de la Republique.b: Cour de justice de la Republique

La Chaine parlementaire.d: Funds LCP (La Chaine parlementaire), the parliamentary television channel comprising LCP-AN (National Assembly) and Public Senat, broadcasting parliamentary proceedings.

Provision relative aux remunerations pub.d: Provisioning envelope for future public sector wage increases decided during the budget year. Distributed to ministerial programmes upon government decision.
Provision relative aux remunerations pub.b: Civil servants (when wage increases are decided)

Depenses accidentelles et imprevisibles.d: Reserve envelope for unforeseen and accidental expenditures that cannot be anticipated during budget preparation or covered by existing programme allocations.

Navigation aerienne.d: Funds air traffic control services within the DGAC budgetary annex, managing en-route and approach control for 3 million annual flights over France.
Navigation aerienne.b: DSNA (air navigation), air traffic controllers, airlines

Transports aeriens, surveillance et cert.d: Funds civil aviation oversight: airline and aircraft certification (OSAC), airport safety inspection, territorial air connectivity subsidies (OSP routes).

Edition et diffusion.d: Funds the DILA (Direction de l’information legale et administrative) for publishing the Journal officiel, Legifrance, service-public.fr, and official government publications.

Pilotage et ressources humaines.d: HR management and administrative support for the DILA (Direction de l’information legale et administrative) budgetary annex operations.

Contribution au desendettement de l’Etat.d: Real estate disposal proceeds allocated to State debt reduction. Unfunded since 2018.

Operations immobilieres et entretien des.d: Funds structural real estate operations and maintenance on State buildings using proceeds from property disposals, managed by the Direction de l’immobilier de l’Etat.
Operations immobilieres et entretien des.b: State building occupants, Direction de l’immobilier de l’Etat

Operations en capital interessant les pa.d: Funds State equity operations managed by APE (Agence des participations): capital increases, acquisitions, and divestments in State-held companies (EDF, SNCF, Engie, etc.).
Operations en capital interessant les pa.b: APE, State-owned enterprises (EDF, SNCF, Orange, etc.)

Desendettement de l’Etat et d’etablissem.d: Allocates privatization and divestment proceeds to reduce State and public entity debt through the Caisse de la dette publique.
Desendettement de l’Etat et d’etablissem.b: Caisse de la dette publique, State balance sheet

Pensions civiles et militaires de retrai.d: Manages civil and military retirement pensions for 2.5 million State retirees, representing 95% of the CAS Pensions (EUR 66 billion in 2026). Funded by employer/employee contributions.
Pensions civiles et militaires de retrai.b: Retired civil servants, retired military personnel

Ouvriers des etablissements industriels.d: Funds the FSPOEIE special pension scheme for workers in State industrial establishments (arsenals, military workshops) and work accident annuity fund.

Pensions militaires d’invalidite et des.d: Covers military disability pensions, war victims’ pensions, Alsace-Moselle pensions, and other miscellaneous State pension obligations. A declining portfolio.

Structures et dispositifs de securite ro.d: Funds road safety infrastructure (automated speed cameras, radar deployment) and ANTAI (national agency for automated offence processing) from traffic fine revenue.

Contribution a l’equipement des collecti.d: Traffic fine redistribution for local transport improvements. Merged into programme 754.

Controle et modernisation de la politiqu.d: Funds modernization of traffic control policy through technology upgrades, video enforcement, and administrative systems improvement.

Contribution a l’equipement des collecti.d: Redistributes traffic fine revenue to local authorities for public transport improvements, road safety infrastructure, and traffic circulation projects.

Desendettement de l’Etat.d: Allocates a portion of traffic and parking fine revenue to State debt reduction.

Developpement et transfert en agricultur.d: Former CASDAR programme. Renumbered as programme 775.

Recherche appliquee et innovation en agr.d: Former CASDAR programme. Renumbered as programme 776.

Developpement et transfert en agricultur.d: Funds agricultural development and knowledge transfer through CASDAR (EUR 146 million), supporting chambers of agriculture (APCA), extension services, and farm advisory.

Recherche appliquee et innovation en agr.d: Funds applied agricultural research and innovation through CASDAR, including technical institutes (ACTA network), experimental stations, and agri-innovation projects.
Recherche appliquee et innovation en agr.b: Agricultural technical institutes, INRAE partnerships, experimental farms

Electrification rurale.d: Provides FACE fund (Fonds d’amortissement des charges d’electrification) grants for rural electrification network improvements, extensions, and underground cabling.

Operations de maitrise de la demande d’e.d: Funds energy demand management, local renewable electricity production, and energy self-sufficiency projects in non-interconnected zones (overseas territories, islands).
Operations de maitrise de la demande d’e.b: Non-interconnected territories (DOM-TOM), local renewable energy producers

Avances a l’Agence de services et de pai.d: Provides advance payments to ASP for pre-financing EU CAP (Common Agricultural Policy) aid to farmers before EU reimbursement. Annual flow of EUR 9+ billion.
Avances a l’Agence de services et de pai.b: ASP, French farmers receiving CAP payments (PAC)

Avances a des organismes distincts de l’.d: Provides temporary State advances to public entities and organizations managing public services that face cash flow timing issues.
Avances a des organismes distincts de l’.b: Public entities with cash flow needs

Prets et avances a des services de l’Eta.d: Provides loans and advances to State services requiring temporary financing for specific operations or projects.

Avances a l’ONIAM au titre de l’indemnis.d: Provides advances to ONIAM (national medical accident compensation office) specifically for compensating victims of the Benfluorex (Mediator) pharmaceutical scandal.

Prets a FranceAgriMer au titre des prefi.d: Provides loans to FranceAgriMer for pre-financing EU agricultural support funds (FEAGA, FEADER) pending European reimbursement.
Prets a FranceAgriMer au titre des prefi.b: FranceAgriMer, agricultural beneficiaries of EU funds

Avances aux collectivites et etablisseme.d: Provides exceptional State advances to overseas collectivities (New Caledonia, Polynesia, Wallis-et-Futuna, Saint-Pierre-et-Miquelon) and public entities facing temporary difficulties.
Avances aux collectivites et etablisseme.b: New Caledonia, French Polynesia, overseas collectivities

Avances sur le montant des impositions r.d: Provides monthly advance payments on tax revenue allocated to 36,000+ local authorities, ensuring regular monthly cash flow before actual tax collections. The largest CCF programme.

France Televisions (former).d: Former audiovisual advance for France Televisions (EUR 2.5 billion). Replaced by programme 372 in PLF 2025.

ARTE France (former).d: Former audiovisual advance for ARTE France (EUR 300M). Replaced by programme 373.

Radio France (former).d: Former audiovisual advance for Radio France (EUR 660M). Replaced by programme 374.

France Medias Monde (former).d: Former audiovisual advance for France 24/RFI (EUR 300M). Replaced by programme 375.

Institut national de l’audiovisuel (form.d: Former audiovisual advance for INA (EUR 105M). Replaced by programme 376.

TV5 Monde (former).d: Former audiovisual advance for TV5 Monde (EUR 85M). Replaced by programme 377.

Prets du Tresor a des Etats etrangers en.d: Provides concessional Treasury loans (RPE) to foreign states to finance purchases of French goods and services, supporting French export competitiveness.

Prets a des Etats etrangers pour consoli.d: Manages debt consolidation loans to foreign states restructuring bilateral debt to France under Paris Club multilateral debt relief frameworks.

Prets a l’Agence francaise de developpem.d: Provides concessional State loans to AFD enabling it to grant soft loans to developing countries. Being phased down (EUR 145M in 2025 to EUR 90M by 2028).
Prets a l’Agence francaise de developpem.b: AFD, developing countries receiving concessional loans

Prets et avances pour le logement des ag.d: Provides housing loans and advances to State employees for home purchase, particularly in high-cost housing areas (Ile-de-France, overseas).

Prets pour le developpement economique e.d: Provides State loans for economic and social development purposes to private individuals and organizations for specific public-interest projects.

Prets a la societe concessionnaire de la.d: Provides State loans to the CDG Express concession company for the direct rail link between Paris Gare de l’Est and Roissy-CDG airport.

Avances a l’ASP - PAC (former).d: Former programme for CAP pre-financing advances. Renumbered as programme 821.

Avances a l’AGRASC.d: Advances to AGRASC for managing criminally seized and confiscated assets.

Controle et exploitation aeriens.d: Former single DGAC aviation programme. Split into programmes 612, 613, and 614.

Remboursements et dégrèvements d’impôts.d: Covers all refunds, rebates, and tax relief on national/state-level taxes (income tax, corporate tax, VAT, etc.). This is a technical budget line reflecting amounts the state must return to taxpayers due to overpayments, tax credits, or legal adjustments rather than discretionary spending.
Remboursements et dégrèvements d’impôts.b: All taxpayers (individuals and corporations) entitled to refunds or relief on state taxes

Avances aux collectivités territoriales.d: Cash advances from the central government to local authorities (communes, departments, regions) and overseas collectivities governed by constitutional articles 73, 74 and 76. These advances smooth cash flow, as the state collects local taxes centrally before redistributing them.
Avances aux collectivités territoriales.b: Local and regional governments, overseas territorial collectivities (DOM-TOM)

Remboursements et restitutions liés à la.d: Refunds and restitutions arising from the normal mechanics of the tax system, principally VAT input-tax credits that exceed output-tax liabilities. This is the largest sub-action within the tax refund mission.
Remboursements et restitutions liés à la.b: Businesses and individuals receiving mechanical tax refunds, especially VAT-registered companies

Taxe sur la valeur ajoutée.d: The VAT refund and relief component within the state tax refund mission. Covers reimbursements of VAT credits to businesses whose deductible input VAT exceeds their collected output VAT.
Taxe sur la valeur ajoutée.b: VAT-registered businesses, especially exporters and capital-intensive firms with structural VAT credit positions

Fonctionnaires civils relevant du code d.d: Pension payments to retired civilian civil servants under the Civil and Military Pensions Code (Code des pensions civiles et militaires). This is the state’s direct pension obligation for its former civilian employees, managed through the CAS Pensions account.
Fonctionnaires civils relevant du code d.b: Retired civilian civil servants of the French state and their survivors

Dette.d: Debt servicing costs of the French state, covering interest payments on government bonds (OATs and BTFs) and other sovereign debt instruments. Managed by the Agence France Trésor.
Dette.b: Holders of French government debt (institutional investors, banks, foreign governments, retail investors)

Remboursements et dégrèvements liées à d.d: Tax refunds and relief specifically linked to deliberate public policy choices (e.g., tax credits for energy transition, employment incentives, R&D credits) as opposed to mechanical tax adjustments. Reflects the fiscal cost of tax expenditures.
Remboursements et dégrèvements liées à d.b: Taxpayers (individuals and firms) benefiting from policy-driven tax credits and incentives

Aides personnelles.d: Personal housing subsidies (APL, ALS, ALF) paid to tenants and homeowners to reduce their housing costs. Managed through the FNAL (Fonds national d’aide au logement) and distributed by CAFs.
Aides personnelles.b: Low- and moderate-income tenants, students, and homeowners paying mortgages

Allocations et aides en faveur des perso.d: Disability benefits including the Allocation aux Adultes Handicapés (AAH) and associated supplements. Provides a minimum income guarantee and additional support for people with disabilities who cannot fully support themselves through employment.
Allocations et aides en faveur des perso.b: Adults with disabilities (incapacity rate of 50% or above) and their households

Impôts sur les sociétés.d: Corporate income tax refund and relief component within the state tax refund mission. Covers CIR (research tax credit) reimbursements, CICE residual refunds, and other corporate tax overpayment restitutions.
Impôts sur les sociétés.b: Corporations and businesses eligible for corporate tax refunds, especially those claiming R&D tax credits

Enseignement en collège.d: Funding for lower secondary education (collège, ages 11-15, grades 6e to 3e) within the national education system. Primarily covers teacher salaries and pedagogical costs for the roughly 7,000 public collèges.
Enseignement en collège.b: Students aged 11-15 in public lower secondary schools and their teaching staff

Remboursements et dégrèvements liés à la.d: Tax refunds and write-offs related to the administrative management of state revenue, including corrections of assessment errors, statute-of-limitations write-offs, and admissions en non-valeur (uncollectible debts).
Remboursements et dégrèvements liés à la.b: Taxpayers whose assessments are corrected; the state itself through clearing of uncollectible receivables

Enseignement élémentaire.d: Funding for elementary/primary education (ages 6-11, CP through CM2). Covers primarily teacher salaries in public primary schools across France.
Enseignement élémentaire.b: Students aged 6-11 in public elementary schools and their teaching staff

Impôt sur le revenu.d: Income tax refund and relief component within the state tax refund mission. Covers reimbursements of excess withholding, tax credits (emploi à domicile, transition énergétique, dons), and other personal income tax adjustments.
Impôt sur le revenu.b: Individual income taxpayers receiving refunds or benefiting from tax credits

Prime d’activité et autres dispositifs.d: The Prime d’activité (in-work benefit created in 2016, replacing the Prime pour l’emploi and RSA activité) and related employment incentive schemes. Provides an income supplement to low-wage workers to make work pay.
Prime d’activité et autres dispositifs.b: Low-income workers (employees and self-employed) aged 18+ with earnings below a threshold

Militaires relevant du code des pensions.d: Pension payments to retired military personnel under the Civil and Military Pensions Code. Covers all branches of the armed forces and is funded through the CAS Pensions special account.
Militaires relevant du code des pensions.b: Retired military personnel of all branches and their survivors

Prêts et avances à divers services de l’.d: Loans and cash advances from the Treasury to various state agencies and public service operators. These are repayable advances that help manage cash flow for entities delivering public services.
Prêts et avances à divers services de l’.b: State agencies, public establishments, and organisms managing public services

Avances à l’Agence de services et de pai.d: Treasury advances to the ASP (Agence de services et de paiement) to pre-finance EU Common Agricultural Policy subsidies before reimbursement from the EU budget. Ensures French farmers receive CAP payments on time.
Avances à l’Agence de services et de pai.b: French farmers and agricultural producers receiving CAP direct payments and rural development funds, via the ASP

Avances au titre du préfinancement des a.d: A broader envelope for Treasury advances to pre-finance EU Common Agricultural Policy payments. France advances funds to farmers pending EU reimbursement, given the scale of French agriculture within the CAP.
Avances au titre du préfinancement des a.b: French farmers, agricultural cooperatives, and rural development beneficiaries under the CAP

Enseignement général et technologique en.d: Funding for general and technological upper secondary education (lycée, ages 15-18, classes de seconde to terminale). Covers teacher salaries and pedagogical costs for the baccalauréat général and technologique tracks.
Enseignement général et technologique en.b: Students aged 15-18 in general and technological lycées, and their teaching staff

Préparation des forces terrestres - Pers.d: Personnel costs for French Army ground forces attributed to the overarching ’Preparation and Employment of Forces’ defense program. Covers salaries, allowances, and social charges for army soldiers and civilian staff.
Préparation des forces terrestres - Pers.b: Active-duty French Army personnel and civilian defense employees assigned to ground forces

Ressources humaines des forces terrestre.d: Human resources management for French Army ground forces, encompassing recruitment, training, career management, pay, and conditions of service for army personnel.
Ressources humaines des forces terrestre.b: French Army soldiers and civilian personnel

Impôt sur les sociétés.d: A distinct corporate tax refund sub-action, likely covering a different category of IS reimbursements (e.g., policy-driven corporate tax credits as opposed to mechanical refunds) within the Remboursements et dégrèvements mission.
Impôt sur les sociétés.b: Corporations benefiting from policy-driven corporate tax reliefs

Enseignement pré-élémentaire.d: Funding for pre-elementary (nursery/maternelle) education for children aged 3-6 (petite, moyenne, grande section). Since 2019, schooling is compulsory from age 3 in France, significantly expanding this line.
Enseignement pré-élémentaire.b: Children aged 3-6 in public maternelle schools and their teaching staff

Engagement et combat.d: Operational engagement and combat capabilities of the French armed forces, covering the deployment of forces in external operations (OPEX), internal security operations (Sentinelle), and combat readiness.
Engagement et combat.b: French armed forces personnel deployed in operations; national defense and security

Dissuasion.d: France’s nuclear deterrence program, covering both the oceanic component (SNLE ballistic missile submarines) and the airborne component (ASMPA missiles on Rafale jets). One of the most protected budget lines in French defense.
Dissuasion.b: French strategic forces (Force océanique stratégique and Forces aériennes stratégiques); defense industrial base

Acomptes de crédits et de réductions d’i.d: Advance payments of income tax credits and reductions paid to taxpayers in January each year (since the 2019 prélèvement à la source reform). Covers 60% advances on recurring tax credits like emploi à domicile and dons.
Acomptes de crédits et de réductions d’i.b: Individual income taxpayers who claimed tax credits in the prior year

Enseignement professionnel sous statut s.d: Funding for vocational secondary education delivered in lycées professionnels under school-based status (as opposed to apprenticeship). Covers CAP, baccalauréat professionnel, and BTS preparation tracks.
Enseignement professionnel sous statut s.b: Students in vocational lycées (lycées professionnels) preparing professional qualifications

Désendettement de l’État ou d’établissem.d: Debt reduction for the state or its public establishments, funded primarily through privatization proceeds and exceptional revenues channeled through the CAS Participations financières de l’État.
Désendettement de l’État ou d’établissem.b: The French state and public establishments (reducing their debt burden)

Avances aux départements sur le produit.d: Cash advances to départements from their share of the domestic consumption tax on energy products (TICPE). Departments receive a fraction of TICPE to compensate for transferred competences (RSA, roads), and these advances ensure timely payment.
Avances aux départements sur le produit.b: Departmental councils (conseils départementaux) receiving TICPE revenue transfers

Développement des compétences par l’alte.d: Skills development through work-study alternance programs, primarily apprenticeship contracts. Covers state subsidies to training centers (CFA), employer incentives, and the overall apprenticeship ecosystem expansion.
Développement des compétences par l’alte.b: Apprentices, employers hiring apprentices, and Centres de Formation d’Apprentis (CFA)

Remboursements et dégrèvements d’impôts.d: Refunds and relief on local taxes (property taxes, former taxe d’habitation, CFE) that the state reimburses to local authorities. The state compensates local governments when it grants exemptions on their behalf.
Remboursements et dégrèvements d’impôts.b: Taxpayers receiving local tax relief; local authorities compensated by the state

Augmentations de capital, dotations en f.d: Capital increases, equity endowments, shareholder advances, and quasi-equity loans to state-owned enterprises and public entities through the CAS Participations financières de l’État. The state’s role as shareholder.
Augmentations de capital, dotations en f.b: State-owned enterprises (EDF, SNCF, La Poste, etc.) and strategic public entities

Recherche.d: Research funding within the higher education and research mission, covering grants to public research organizations (CNRS, INSERM, INRIA, CEA, etc.) and support for fundamental and applied research across disciplines.
Recherche.b: Public research organizations, university laboratories, and researchers

Soutien aux énergies renouvelables élect.d: Subsidies for renewable electricity generation in mainland France, covering feed-in tariffs and contracts for difference (complément de rémunération) for wind, solar, biomass, and other renewable sources. Previously funded through the CSPE.
Soutien aux énergies renouvelables élect.b: Renewable electricity producers (wind farms, solar parks, biomass plants) in metropolitan France

Ordre et sécurité publics.d: Public order and security operations of the Gendarmerie nationale, covering crowd control, rural policing, highway patrol, and territorial security across France’s rural areas and small towns.
Ordre et sécurité publics.b: French citizens in gendarmerie zones (rural and peri-urban areas); Gendarmerie personnel

Ordre et sécurité publics - hors adminis.d: The field-operations portion of the Gendarmerie’s public order and security mission, excluding central administration and ministerial cabinet costs. Reflects actual operational deployment in the territories.
Ordre et sécurité publics - hors adminis.b: Gendarmerie operational units in the field; local populations served

Pilotage, administration et encadrement.d: Administrative leadership and pedagogical supervision of the national education system, including rectorats, académies, school inspectors (IEN, IA-IPR), and pedagogical advisors who oversee teaching quality.
Pilotage, administration et encadrement.b: School inspectors, academic administrators, and indirectly students and teachers through quality oversight

Sécurité et paix publiques.d: Day-to-day public safety and peace operations of the Police nationale, including patrol, neighborhood policing, crime prevention, and response to disturbances in urban areas.
Sécurité et paix publiques.b: French citizens in police zones (urban areas); Police nationale personnel

Formation initiale et continue du baccal.d: Initial and continuing higher education at the undergraduate level (bac to licence/bachelor’s). Covers university operating costs, lecturer salaries, and pedagogical resources for licence programs.
Formation initiale et continue du baccal.b: University students in licence (bachelor’s) programs and university teaching staff

Actions pour favoriser la mise en activi.d: Employment activation measures to help jobseekers find work, including subsidized employment contracts (contrats aidés), professional integration programs, and support services operated through France Travail (formerly Pôle emploi).
Actions pour favoriser la mise en activi.b: Unemployed jobseekers, especially long-term unemployed and those facing employment barriers

Sécurité et paix publiques - Hors admini.d: Field operations component of the Police nationale’s public safety mission, excluding headquarters and ministerial cabinet costs. Represents the actual policing presence on the ground in urban zones.
Sécurité et paix publiques - Hors admini.b: Police nationale operational units; urban populations served by local police commissariats

Préparation des forces navales.d: Preparation and readiness of French naval forces (Marine nationale), covering training, equipment maintenance, operational availability of surface ships, submarines, and naval aviation, and personnel readiness.
Préparation des forces navales.b: French Navy personnel; naval operational readiness and fleet capability

Concours financiers aux collectivités te.d: Financial grants from the state to local authorities and their groupings (intercommunalités), including components of the DGF (dotation globale de fonctionnement), DGE, DETR, and other equalization transfers.
Concours financiers aux collectivités te.b: Communes, departments, regions, and intercommunal groupings (EPCIs)

Garde et contrôle des personnes placées.d: Custody and supervision of persons under judicial control, operated by the Direction de l’administration pénitentiaire. Covers prison operations, detention facility management, staffing, and security for approximately 75,000 inmates.
Garde et contrôle des personnes placées.b: Incarcerated persons; prison staff (surveillants pénitentiaires); the justice system

Préparation des forces aériennes.d: Preparation and readiness of the French Air and Space Force (Armée de l’air et de l’espace), covering pilot training, aircraft maintenance, air base operations, and personnel readiness.
Préparation des forces aériennes.b: French Air and Space Force personnel; air operational capability

Aides aux employeurs d’apprentis.d: Financial incentives for employers hiring apprentices, including the aide unique aux employeurs d’apprentis (up to EUR 6,000 per apprentice since 2023). Massively expanded since the 2020 apprenticeship reform plan.
Aides aux employeurs d’apprentis.b: Employers (especially SMEs) hiring apprentices under apprenticeship contracts

Taxe sur la valeur ajoutée - Dégrèvement.d: VAT-specific refunds for amounts unduly collected by the state, including corrections of erroneous assessments, litigation-related restitutions, and administrative relief on contested VAT amounts.
Taxe sur la valeur ajoutée - Dégrèvement.b: Businesses and individuals receiving restitution of wrongly collected VAT

Régime de retraite du personnel de la SN.d: State subsidy to the special pension regime of SNCF (French national railway) workers. This regime is structurally in deficit due to a high retiree-to-active ratio, requiring substantial state transfers to remain solvent.
Régime de retraite du personnel de la SN.b: Retired SNCF railway workers and their survivors

Conduite et pilotage des politiques de l.d: Administrative leadership and support functions for the Ministry of Ecological Transition, covering staff costs, IT systems, real estate, and cross-cutting support for environmental, energy, and transport policies.
Conduite et pilotage des politiques de l.b: Ministry of Ecological Transition staff and administrative operations

Commandement et maîtrise de l’informatio.d: Military command, control, communications, and intelligence (C3I) capabilities, including cyber defense, signals intelligence, satellite communications, and information systems for the armed forces.
Commandement et maîtrise de l’informatio.b: French armed forces command structures; military intelligence services (DRM, DGSE support)

Police judiciaire.d: Criminal investigation operations of the Gendarmerie nationale, including serious crime investigation, forensics, organized crime, cybercrime, and judicial police functions in gendarmerie zones.
Police judiciaire.b: Gendarmerie criminal investigation units (sections de recherches); the justice system and crime victims

Commandement, ressources humaines et log.d: Command structure, human resources management, and logistics support for the Gendarmerie nationale, including recruitment, training (schools of gendarmerie), career management, and material support.
Commandement, ressources humaines et log.b: Gendarmerie nationale personnel and administrative support functions

Ferroviaire.d: State funding for the rail transport sector, including contributions to SNCF Réseau for rail infrastructure maintenance and renewal, support for regional rail services (TER), and rail freight incentives.
Ferroviaire.b: SNCF Réseau, regional rail operators, rail freight companies, and rail passengers

Police judiciaire - Hors administration.d: Field-level criminal investigation operations of the Gendarmerie, excluding central headquarters and cabinet costs. Represents the decentralized judicial police work across French territories.
Police judiciaire - Hors administration.b: Gendarmerie field investigation units across departments and regions

Vie scolaire et éducation à la responsab.d: School life and citizenship education programs, including student supervision (CPE - conseillers principaux d’éducation, AED - assistants d’éducation), school climate initiatives, anti-bullying programs, and civic education.
Vie scolaire et éducation à la responsab.b: Secondary school students; conseillers principaux d’éducation and assistants d’éducation

Inclusion scolaire des élèves en situati.d: Inclusive education for students with disabilities, primarily funding AESH (Accompagnants des Élèves en Situation de Handicap) who provide individualized support. Also covers ULIS units and adapted pedagogical resources.
Inclusion scolaire des élèves en situati.b: Students with disabilities in mainstream schools; AESH support staff

Préparation des forces navales - Personn.d: Personnel costs for French Navy forces attributed to the ’Preparation and Employment of Forces’ defense program. Covers salaries and social charges for naval personnel (sailors, officers, and civilian staff).
Préparation des forces navales - Personn.b: Active-duty French Navy personnel and civilian defense employees assigned to naval forces

Ressources humaines des forces navales.d: Human resources management for the French Navy, covering recruitment, training (École navale, specialist schools), career management, pay, and conditions of service for naval personnel.
Ressources humaines des forces navales.b: French Navy personnel (sailors, officers, and civilian staff)

Hébergement et logement adapté.d: Emergency and transitional housing for vulnerable populations, including CHRS (centres d’hébergement et de réinsertion sociale), emergency shelters, adapted housing (pensions de famille, résidences accueil), and the winter plan for homeless persons.
Hébergement et logement adapté.b: Homeless persons, asylum seekers in emergency housing, and vulnerable populations in transitional accommodation

Préparation des forces aériennes - Perso.d: Personnel costs for French Air and Space Force attributed to the ’Preparation and Employment of Forces’ defense program. Covers salaries and social charges for air force personnel.
Préparation des forces aériennes - Perso.b: Active-duty French Air and Space Force personnel and civilian defense employees

Ressources humaines des forces aériennes.d: Human resources management for the French Air and Space Force, including pilot and technician recruitment, training (École de l’air), career paths, and service conditions.
Ressources humaines des forces aériennes.b: French Air and Space Force personnel (pilots, technicians, officers, civilian staff)

Logistique et soutien interarmées.d: Joint logistics and support services across all branches of the French armed forces, including supply chains, maintenance, transport, medical support, and base infrastructure managed by the Service du commissariat des armées and other joint structures.
Logistique et soutien interarmées.b: All branches of the French armed forces; joint support commands

Logistique et soutien interarmées - Pers.d: Personnel costs for joint logistics and support services attributed to the ’Preparation and Employment of Forces’ defense program. Covers the workforce enabling cross-branch logistical operations.
Logistique et soutien interarmées - Pers.b: Military and civilian personnel in joint logistics and support roles

Solaire photovoltaïque.d: Support for solar photovoltaic electricity generation through feed-in tariffs and contracts for difference. Covers legacy high-tariff contracts from the 2006-2010 period and newer competitive auction-based support.
Solaire photovoltaïque.b: Solar PV plant operators (utility-scale and rooftop installations)

Formation initiale et continue de niveau.d: Initial and continuing higher education at the master’s level. Covers university teaching costs, research-linked teaching, and pedagogical resources for master’s degree programs across French universities.
Formation initiale et continue de niveau.b: Master’s degree students in public universities and university teaching/research staff

Maintien en condition opérationnelle du.d: Maintenance and operational readiness of French Navy equipment, including warship overhauls, submarine refits, naval aviation maintenance, and spare parts. A critical and growing budget line given fleet aging.
Maintien en condition opérationnelle du.b: French Navy operational capability; naval maintenance contractors (Naval Group, etc.)

Missions de police judiciaire et concour.d: Criminal investigation and judicial support missions of the Police nationale, including the Police judiciaire (PJ) directorates, crime scene forensics (police technique et scientifique), and cooperation with courts.
Missions de police judiciaire et concour.b: Police nationale criminal investigation units; the judicial system and crime victims

Impôts sur le revenu - Dégrèvements et r.d: Income tax-specific refunds for amounts unduly collected, including corrections following audit disputes, litigation settlements, and administrative corrections of erroneous income tax assessments.
Impôts sur le revenu - Dégrèvements et r.b: Individual income taxpayers receiving restitution of erroneously collected amounts

Missions de police judiciaire et concour.d: Field-level criminal investigation operations of the Police nationale, excluding Paris headquarters and ministerial cabinet. Represents the decentralized PJ operations across police zones.
Missions de police judiciaire et concour.b: Police nationale field investigation units (SRPJ, antennes PJ) across the territory

Réglementation, politique technique et q.d: Building regulation, technical standards, and construction quality policies, including thermal regulation enforcement (RE2020), accessibility standards, construction permits processing, and housing quality improvement programs (ANAH subsidies).
Réglementation, politique technique et q.b: Homeowners, construction industry, social housing operators (via ANAH renovation subsidies)

Aides directes.d: Direct financial aid to individuals or households, typically within a social or housing policy context. May include direct subsidies for specific populations such as low-income households or those in precarious situations.
Aides directes.b: Low-income households and individuals receiving direct state financial assistance

Enseignement post-baccalauréat en lycée.d: Post-baccalaureate education delivered within lycées, primarily BTS (Brevet de Technicien Supérieur) programs and CPGE (Classes Préparatoires aux Grandes Écoles). These are higher education tracks housed in secondary school infrastructure.
Enseignement post-baccalauréat en lycée.b: Students in BTS and CPGE programs; lycée-based higher education teaching staff

Mesures pour favoriser le recrutement pa.d: Tax and social charge exemptions to encourage private individuals to hire household employees (cleaning, childcare, gardening, home care). Linked to the CESU system and the tax credit for emploi à domicile.
Mesures pour favoriser le recrutement pa.b: Private household employers and their domestic employees; the CESU-registered home services sector

Préparation et conduite des opérations d.d: Personnel costs at the DGA (Direction Générale de l’Armement) for preparing and managing weapons procurement programs attributed to the ’Equipment of Forces’ program. Covers engineers, program managers, and test personnel.
Préparation et conduite des opérations d.b: DGA personnel (engineers, project managers, test pilots/technicians)

Soutien aux opérations d’armement.d: Support activities for weapons procurement operations, including DGA testing facilities, quality assurance, technical expertise, and infrastructure supporting the development and acquisition of military equipment.
Soutien aux opérations d’armement.b: DGA support functions; defense procurement ecosystem

Entretien et équipements des forces aéri.d: Maintenance and equipment for the French Air and Space Force, including aircraft maintenance (Rafale, A400M, Mirage 2000), spare parts procurement, and operational equipment for air bases.
Entretien et équipements des forces aéri.b: French Air and Space Force operational readiness; aerospace maintenance industry (Dassault, Safran, etc.)

Crédit d’impôt contemporain - Services a.d: The contemporaneous (real-time) tax credit for personal services, introduced with the prélèvement à la source reform. Allows immediate 50% tax credit for home services rather than waiting for the annual tax settlement.
Crédit d’impôt contemporain - Services a.b: Households employing home service workers (childcare, elderly care, cleaning, tutoring)

Accompagnement des personnes les plus él.d: Support for people furthest from the labor market through the Employment Inclusion Fund, covering subsidized contracts (PEC - Parcours Emploi Compétences), insertion workshops, and specialized support for vulnerable jobseekers.
Accompagnement des personnes les plus él.b: Long-term unemployed, disabled workers, young people without qualifications, and other hard-to-employ populations

Besoins éducatifs particuliers.d: Special educational needs provision within the primary education sector, including RASED (Réseaux d’Aides Spécialisées aux Élèves en Difficulté), specialized teachers, school psychologists, and adapted instruction for students with learning difficulties.
Besoins éducatifs particuliers.b: Primary school students with special educational needs; specialized teachers and school psychologists

Autres remboursements et dégrèvements li.d: Write-off of uncollectible tax debts (admissions en non-valeur) where collection has been deemed impossible due to debtor insolvency, disappearance, or expired statute of limitations. An accounting clean-up mechanism.
Autres remboursements et dégrèvements li.b: The state’s accounting system (clearing irrecoverable receivables); indirectly, insolvent debtors whose debts are extinguished

Remplacement.d: Substitute teacher deployment to cover teacher absences in primary and secondary schools. Funds the pool of replacement teachers (titulaires remplaçants and contractuels) who fill temporary vacancies.
Remplacement.b: Students whose teachers are absent; replacement/substitute teachers

Préparation des forces terrestres.d: Non-personnel costs for French Army ground force preparation, covering equipment procurement, training exercises, operational readiness activities, and equipment modernization beyond what is captured in personnel lines.
Préparation des forces terrestres.b: French Army units; ground force operational capability

Financement des structures de la formati.d: Funding for vocational training and employment service infrastructure, including France Travail (formerly Pôle emploi), Missions locales for youth employment, AFPA (national vocational training agency), and regional training organizations.
Financement des structures de la formati.b: France Travail, Missions locales, AFPA, and other employment/training service providers

Structures de mise en oeuvre de la polit.d: Operational structures implementing employment policy, including France Travail agencies, Missions locales, Maisons de l’emploi, and Cap emploi (for disabled workers). Covers their operating costs and staffing.
Structures de mise en oeuvre de la polit.b: Employment service operators and the jobseekers they serve

Fiscalité des particuliers et fiscalité.d: Tax relief measures related to individual taxation and local direct taxes, covering various exemptions, abatements, and credits granted to individuals on their income tax and local property/residence taxes.
Fiscalité des particuliers et fiscalité.b: Individual taxpayers benefiting from personal tax and local tax relief measures

Taxes foncières.d: State-compensated relief on property taxes (taxe foncière sur les propriétés bâties and non bâties), including exemptions for elderly/disabled low-income property owners and capping mechanisms.
Taxes foncières.b: Property owners receiving property tax exemptions or caps (elderly, disabled, low-income)

Prestations vieillesse et invalidité.d: Old-age and disability benefits paid by the state to its former employees or specific categories, including supplementary pensions, disability allowances, and survivor benefits outside the main pension code regime.
Prestations vieillesse et invalidité.b: State retirees receiving supplementary benefits; disabled former state employees

Industrialisation et déploiement.d: Industrialization and deployment phase of major defense equipment programs, covering the transition from development to serial production and fielding of weapons systems (e.g., Rafale, VBCI, FREMM frigates).
Industrialisation et déploiement.b: Defense industrial base (Dassault, Naval Group, Nexter/KNDS, Thales); armed forces receiving new equipment

Autres impôts directs et taxes assimilée.d: Refunds and relief on other direct taxes and assimilated levies (beyond income tax and corporate tax), including wealth taxes, inheritance tax corrections, and other miscellaneous direct tax adjustments.
Autres impôts directs et taxes assimilée.b: Taxpayers receiving refunds on miscellaneous direct taxes

Financement du service public de l’emplo.d: Core funding for the public employment service, primarily France Travail (formerly Pôle emploi), covering its operational budget, staff costs, and IT infrastructure for managing jobseeker registration and placement services.
Financement du service public de l’emplo.b: France Travail (Pôle emploi) and its staff; jobseekers using public employment services

Frapper à distance - RAFALE.d: Procurement and upgrade of the Dassault Rafale multirole combat aircraft for stand-off strike capability. Covers new aircraft deliveries to reach the fleet target (225 aircraft) and F4/F5 standard upgrades.
Frapper à distance - RAFALE.b: French Air and Space Force and Navy (Aéronavale) Rafale squadrons; Dassault Aviation

Soutien.d: General support and administrative functions for a ministry or defense program, covering cross-cutting activities like IT, facilities management, communications, legal affairs, and general administration.
Soutien.b: Administrative and support staff; the operational programs they enable

Soutien aux projets des communes et grou.d: State investment grants supporting capital projects by communes and intercommunal groupings, primarily through DETR (dotation d’équipement des territoires ruraux) and DSIL (dotation de soutien à l’investissement local).
Soutien aux projets des communes et grou.b: Communes and intercommunal groupings (EPCIs) undertaking infrastructure and public facility investments

Anciens combattants, mémoire et liens av.d: Veterans affairs, remembrance, and links between the armed forces and society. Covers veterans’ pensions, the ONACVG (Office national des anciens combattants), war memorials, and civic-military outreach programs.
Anciens combattants, mémoire et liens av.b: War veterans, their widows and orphans; remembrance organizations

Reconnaissance et réparation en faveur d.d: Recognition and reparation for veterans, including military disability pensions (pensions militaires d’invalidité), the retraite du combattant, and special allocations. Also covers memory and commemoration activities.
Reconnaissance et réparation en faveur d.b: Disabled veterans, holders of the carte du combattant, and war widows/orphans

Ordre public et protection de la souvera.d: Public order maintenance and sovereignty protection by the Police nationale, including CRS (Compagnies Républicaines de Sécurité) riot units, VIP protection, counter-terrorism, and border security operations.
Ordre public et protection de la souvera.b: CRS units, counter-terrorism services (RAID, DGSI), and border police; public safety

Indemnisation des demandeurs d’emploi.d: State contribution to unemployment compensation, including the ASS (Allocation de Solidarité Spécifique) for long-term unemployed who have exhausted their insurance-based rights, and other state-funded solidarity allowances.
Indemnisation des demandeurs d’emploi.b: Long-term unemployed persons receiving solidarity-based unemployment benefits

Pilotage et support du programme.d: Program management and support functions providing administrative infrastructure, strategic steering, performance monitoring, and cross-cutting services for a specific ministry or budget program.
Pilotage et support du programme.b: Program managers and administrative staff; the operational actions they support

Assurer la crédibilité technique de la d.d: Technical credibility of nuclear deterrence through CEA/DAM (military applications division) operations, including nuclear warhead simulation (Laser Mégajoule), maintenance of the arsenal, and supporting scientific activities.
Assurer la crédibilité technique de la d.b: CEA/DAM (Commissariat à l’énergie atomique, Direction des applications militaires); nuclear deterrence capability

Ordre public et protection de la souvera.d: Field-level public order and sovereignty protection operations of the Police nationale, excluding central administration. Represents the deployed CRS, counter-terrorism, and border units across the territory.
Ordre public et protection de la souvera.b: Police nationale field units for public order, counter-terrorism, and border security

Coopération bilatérale.d: Bilateral development cooperation, primarily French overseas development aid (APD) channeled through bilateral partnerships with developing countries, especially in francophone Africa. Includes AFD (Agence Française de Développement) programs.
Coopération bilatérale.b: Developing countries (especially francophone Africa); AFD and French development cooperation agencies

Fiscalité des PME.d: Tax relief measures specifically targeting small and medium enterprises (PME), including reduced corporate tax rates for SMEs, special depreciation rules, and tax credits designed to support SME growth and investment.
Fiscalité des PME.b: Small and medium enterprises (PME/TPE) benefiting from targeted tax incentives

Projection - mobilité - soutien.d: Military force projection, mobility, and support capabilities, covering strategic and tactical transport (A400M, C-130, NH90), aerial refueling, sealift, and the logistical support enabling expeditionary operations.
Projection - mobilité - soutien.b: French armed forces expeditionary capability; transport aircraft and ship fleets

Soutien aux entreprises.d: Business support programs including grants, subsidized loans, and technical assistance for enterprise development, competitiveness, and innovation. May include BPI France interventions and sectoral support schemes.
Soutien aux entreprises.b: French businesses, especially SMEs and startups, receiving state support for growth and innovation

Recherche dans les domaines de l’énergie.d: Research in energy, sustainable development, and mobility, primarily through CEA (nuclear and renewable energy research), IFPEN (petroleum and new energies), IFREMER (ocean research), and Météo-France.
Recherche dans les domaines de l’énergie.b: CEA, IFPEN, IFREMER, Météo-France, and other public research bodies in energy/environment

Pilotage et encadrement pédagogique.d: Pedagogical leadership and supervision in a specific education program, covering school inspectors, pedagogical advisors, and academic coordination ensuring curriculum implementation and teaching quality.
Pilotage et encadrement pédagogique.b: School inspectors, pedagogical advisors, and the education system they supervise

Conduite de la politique pénale et jugem.d: Criminal prosecution and adjudication of criminal cases, covering the operations of criminal courts (tribunaux correctionnels, cours d’assises), prosecutors’ offices (parquets), and the conduct of penal policy under the Ministry of Justice.
Conduite de la politique pénale et jugem.b: The judiciary (prosecutors, judges, court staff); defendants and victims in criminal proceedings

Taxe intérieure de consommation sur les.d: Refunds and exemptions on the domestic consumption tax on energy products (TICPE, the main fuel tax), including reduced rates for agriculture, road transport, and industrial uses of energy products.
Taxe intérieure de consommation sur les.b: Farmers, road haulers, and industrial energy users benefiting from TICPE reduced rates or exemptions

Insertion par l’activité économique.d: Integration through economic activity (IAE), funding social enterprise structures that provide employment and support to persons excluded from the conventional labor market, including EI (entreprises d’insertion), ETTI, AI, and ACI.
Insertion par l’activité économique.b: Social integration enterprises (SIAE) and their employees who are far from the labor market

Planification des moyens et conduite des.d: Personnel costs for strategic planning and operational command functions (État-major des armées) attributed to the ’Preparation and Employment of Forces’ program. Covers staff officers and support personnel at joint command level.
Planification des moyens et conduite des.b: French joint military staff (EMA) personnel and operational command structures

Service du commissariat des armées.d: The Joint Defence Commissariat (SCA), created in 2010 by merging the three single-service commissariats. Provides administrative and logistical support (catering, clothing, pay, legal, general supply) across all armed forces branches.
Service du commissariat des armées.b: All branches of the French armed forces served by the SCA

Prospective de défense.d: Defense foresight and advanced research, including upstream R&D (études amont) managed by the DGA to prepare future weapons systems, technology demonstrators, and innovation partnerships with industry and academia.
Prospective de défense.b: DGA research programs; defense industry R&D; academic defense research labs

Maintien en condition opérationnelle du.d: Maintenance and operational readiness of French Army equipment, including armored vehicles (Leclerc, VBCI, Griffon), helicopters (Tigre, NH90), artillery, and other ground forces materiel.
Maintien en condition opérationnelle du.b: French Army operational readiness; army maintenance units and defense contractors (Nexter/KNDS, Arquus)

Contribution économique territoriale et.d: Refunds and relief on the CET (contribution économique territoriale, which replaced the taxe professionnelle in 2010), comprising the CFE and CVAE, as well as other economic levies on businesses.
Contribution économique territoriale et.b: Businesses benefiting from CET exemptions, caps, or refunds

Taxe professionnelle et contribution éco.d: Relief measures transitioning from the former taxe professionnelle to the CET system following the 2010 reform, including compensations to local authorities for lost revenue and transitional relief for affected businesses.
Taxe professionnelle et contribution éco.b: Businesses affected by the TP-to-CET transition; local authorities compensated for revenue changes

Ressources humaines et management.d: Cross-cutting human resources and management functions for a major ministry, covering HR policy, training, social dialogue, workplace health, diversity initiatives, and workforce planning.
Ressources humaines et management.b: Ministry employees benefiting from HR management, training, and social programs

Garantie de l’exercice du droit d’asile.d: Guaranteeing the right to asylum in France, covering the OFPRA (asylum determination), CNDA (appeals court), reception conditions for asylum seekers (hébergement, ADA - allocation pour demandeurs d’asile), and legal assistance.
Garantie de l’exercice du droit d’asile.b: Asylum seekers in France; OFPRA and CNDA staff; reception center operators

Protection et sauvegarde.d: Protection and safeguarding missions of the armed forces on national territory, including POSTURE (air defense, maritime surveillance), participation in civil security (natural disasters), and critical infrastructure protection.
Protection et sauvegarde.b: French armed forces units on homeland defense missions; civil populations in emergency situations

Recherches scientifiques et technologiqu.d: Scientific and technological research in life sciences and health, primarily funding INSERM (Institut national de la santé et de la recherche médicale) and other public research organisms working on biomedical research.
Recherches scientifiques et technologiqu.b: INSERM, Institut Pasteur, and other life science/health research organizations; researchers

Gestion financière du secteur public loc.d: Financial management of the local public sector excluding taxation, covering DGFIP services for local authority accounting, treasury operations, debt management, and financial advisory services to local governments.
Gestion financière du secteur public loc.b: Local authorities receiving DGFIP accounting and financial management services

Traitement et jugement des contentieux c.d: Processing and adjudication of civil disputes, covering the operations of civil courts (tribunaux judiciaires, cours d’appel) for family law, commercial disputes, labor cases, and other civil litigation.
Traitement et jugement des contentieux c.b: The civil judiciary (judges, clerks, court staff); civil litigants and parties in family, commercial, and other civil cases

Aide médicale de l’Etat.d: State Medical Aid (AME) providing healthcare coverage to undocumented immigrants residing in France for more than 3 months and below an income threshold. Covers hospital and outpatient care with some limitations.
Aide médicale de l’Etat.b: Undocumented immigrants in France meeting residency and income conditions

Exonérations liées à l’apprentissage.d: Social contribution exemptions linked to apprenticeship contracts, where the state compensates social security funds for reduced employer charges on apprentice wages to incentivize apprentice hiring.
Exonérations liées à l’apprentissage.b: Employers hiring apprentices; social security funds compensated for lost revenue

Impôts sur les sociétés - Dégrèvements e.d: Corporate tax-specific refunds for amounts unduly collected, including corrections of erroneous assessments, litigation-related restitutions, and administrative adjustments on contested corporate tax amounts.
Impôts sur les sociétés - Dégrèvements e.b: Corporations receiving restitution of erroneously collected corporate tax

Planification des moyens et conduite des.d: Strategic planning and operational command by the État-major des armées (EMA), covering force planning, operational command of deployed forces (CPCO), intelligence coordination, and strategic decision-making for military operations.
Planification des moyens et conduite des.b: French joint military command (EMA/CPCO); all deployed military operations

Recherches scientifiques et technologiqu.d: Scientific and technological research in environmental sciences, funding organizations like CNRS (environmental divisions), INRAE (agriculture and environment), IRD (development research), and BRGM (geological research).
Recherches scientifiques et technologiqu.b: INRAE, CNRS, IRD, BRGM, and other environmental research organizations; researchers

Opérer en milieu hostile - SCORPION.d: The SCORPION program for French Army combat modernization, delivering a new generation of networked armored vehicles (Griffon, Jaguar, Serval) with integrated battle management systems (SICS) for operating in hostile environments.
Opérer en milieu hostile - SCORPION.b: French Army combat units; Nexter/KNDS, Arquus, and Thales (industrial prime contractors)

Immobilier.d: Defense real estate and infrastructure, covering construction, renovation, and maintenance of military bases, barracks, training facilities, and other defense installations across France and overseas territories.
Immobilier.b: French armed forces (all branches); military base communities; construction contractors

Police des étrangers et sûreté des trans.d: Immigration policing and international transport security by the Police nationale (PAF - Police aux Frontières), covering border controls, document verification, removal of irregular migrants, and airport/port security.
Police des étrangers et sûreté des trans.b: PAF (border police) units; international transport operators and travelers

Industrie et services.d: Support for industry and services sectors, including subsidies for industrial competitiveness, digital transformation, strategic sectors support (automotive, aerospace), and service sector modernization programs.
Industrie et services.b: Industrial and service sector companies receiving state support for competitiveness and modernization

Avances aux départements sur les frais d.d: Advances to departments on property tax (taxe foncière) management fees, introduced following the transfer of the taxe foncière share from communes to departments as part of the suppression of the taxe d’habitation.
Avances aux départements sur les frais d.b: Departmental councils (conseils départementaux) receiving property tax management fee transfers

Soutien à l’injection de biométhane.d: Subsidies for biomethane injection into the natural gas grid, through feed-in tariffs guaranteeing a purchase price for biogas producers who upgrade biogas to biomethane quality and inject it into the gas network.
Soutien à l’injection de biométhane.b: Biomethane producers (agricultural digesters, waste treatment plants) injecting into the gas grid

Autres actions relatives à la police des.d: Field-level immigration policing and transport security operations excluding central administration, covering PAF units at borders, airports, ports, and train stations across the territory.
Autres actions relatives à la police des.b: PAF field units; border crossings, airports, and international transport hubs

Formation professionnelle des demandeurs.d: Vocational training for unemployed jobseekers, funding training programs to help the unemployed acquire new skills or qualifications aligned with labor market needs. Includes POEI, AFPR, and regional training programs.
Formation professionnelle des demandeurs.b: Unemployed jobseekers enrolled in vocational training; training providers

Accueil et accompagnement des personnes.d: Reception and support for persons under judicial supervision, covering probation and reintegration services (SPIP - services pénitentiaires d’insertion et de probation), community service supervision, and post-release support.
Accueil et accompagnement des personnes.b: Probationers, parolees, and persons on community sentences; SPIP probation officers

Formation des demandeurs d’emploi aux mé.d: Training unemployed jobseekers specifically for occupations with active hiring demand in the labor market, targeting skills gaps and bottleneck professions (métiers en tension) such as healthcare, construction, IT, and hospitality.
Formation des demandeurs d’emploi aux mé.b: Unemployed persons training for in-demand occupations; employers in shortage sectors

Soutien des forces par les bases de défe.d: Support to armed forces through Bases de Défense (BdD), the joint military base management structures created in 2011 to mutualize administrative and logistical support (catering, accommodation, transport, facilities) across all services at the local level.
Soutien des forces par les bases de défe.b: All military units supported by the 51 Bases de Défense across France; BdD civilian and military support staff

Moyens généraux et d’appui à la recherch.d: General resources and support services for public research organizations, covering shared infrastructure, administrative costs, and cross-cutting support functions for national research bodies.
Moyens généraux et d’appui à la recherch.b: CNRS, INSERM, and other national research organizations

Fonds d’accélération de la transition éc.d: Fund to accelerate ecological transition at the local level, financing green infrastructure projects, energy renovation, and environmental adaptation measures proposed by local authorities.
Fonds d’accélération de la transition éc.b: Communes, departments, and regions implementing ecological transition projects

Recherches scientifiques et technologiqu.d: Funds scientific and technological research in information sciences and technology, including computer science, digital technologies, telecommunications, and data science.
Recherches scientifiques et technologiqu.b: INRIA, CNRS laboratories, and public research institutes in IT and digital sciences

Avances aux régions sur les frais de ges.d: Treasury advances to regions covering management fees related to the collection of corporate land tax (CFE), value-added contribution of enterprises (CVAE), and domestic consumption tax on energy products (TICPE).

Agence nationale de la recherche.d: Funding for the French National Research Agency, which provides competitive project-based grants to public and private research teams across all scientific disciplines.
Agence nationale de la recherche.b: Public research labs, universities, and private-sector R&D partnerships

Action sociale.d: Social welfare programs for state employees including childcare subsidies, housing assistance, meal vouchers, holiday aid, and support for employees facing hardship.

Régimes de retraite des mines, de la SEI.d: State subsidies to balance special pension regimes for former mining workers, former SEITA (state tobacco monopoly) employees, and other legacy public-sector retirement schemes.
Régimes de retraite des mines, de la SEI.b: Retired miners, former SEITA employees, and other legacy regime pensioners

Etudes amont.d: Upstream defense research and technology studies, funding early-stage R&D for future military capabilities before they enter the armament program phase.
Etudes amont.b: DGA (Direction générale de l’armement), defense industry firms, and research labs

Aide économique et financière multilatér.d: French contributions to multilateral economic and financial institutions including the World Bank, IMF, regional development banks, and international economic cooperation funds.
Aide économique et financière multilatér.b: International financial institutions and developing countries

Fonction santé (defense).d: Military health service (Service de santé des armées), covering military hospitals, field medical support, health research for armed forces, and medical training.
Fonction santé (defense).b: Military personnel and their families, military health professionals

Formation des personnels enseignants.d: Initial and continuing training of primary and secondary school teachers, including pedagogical preparation, subject-matter training, and professional development through INSPé (teacher training institutes).
Formation des personnels enseignants.b: Trainee teachers, in-service teachers, and INSPé institutes

Conduite et pilotage des politiques écon.d: Central management and steering of economic and financial policies, covering the administrative support functions of the Ministry of Economy and Finance including HR, IT, logistics, and strategic planning.
Conduite et pilotage des politiques écon.b: Ministry of Economy and Finance central services

Insertion des jeunes sur le marché du tr.d: Youth employment insertion program replacing the Garantie Jeunes, providing intensive coaching and a monthly allowance to young people aged 16-25 who are neither in employment, education, nor training (NEET).
Insertion des jeunes sur le marché du tr.b: Young people aged 16-25 not in employment, education, or training

Aides à l’acquisition de véhicules propr.d: Financial incentives (bonus-malus, conversion premiums) for purchasing low-emission or zero-emission vehicles, encouraging the transition from polluting cars to electric and hybrid alternatives.
Aides à l’acquisition de véhicules propr.b: Individuals and businesses purchasing clean vehicles

Assurer la crédibilité opérationnelle de.d: Operational support and force deployment for France’s nuclear deterrence, covering readiness of submarine-launched and airborne nuclear forces, maintenance, and exercises.
Assurer la crédibilité opérationnelle de.b: Strategic Air Forces, submarine-based nuclear forces, and support units

Mise en oeuvre des décisions judiciaires.d: Implementation of judicial decisions, covering the prison administration (penitentiary services), probation services, electronic monitoring, and post-sentencing enforcement.
Mise en oeuvre des décisions judiciaires.b: Prison administration, probation officers, and persons under judicial supervision

Dotation générale de décentralisation de.d: General decentralization grant to regions, compensating for competences transferred from the state to regional governments under decentralization laws.

Service du commissariat aux armées.d: Joint military commissariat service providing logistical, administrative, and supply-chain support to the armed forces including food services, clothing, transport, and general supplies.
Service du commissariat aux armées.b: All branches of the French armed forces

Soutien au déploiement.d: Support for the deployment of digital and administrative transformation projects across government, including IT infrastructure rollout and modernization programs.

Pilotage, support, audit et évaluations.d: Central steering, administrative support, internal audit, and policy evaluation functions within the Ministry of Social Affairs, covering cross-cutting management tasks.
Pilotage, support, audit et évaluations.b: Ministry of Social Affairs and Health central administration

Gestion financière de l’État hors fiscal.d: State financial management operations outside of taxation, including public accounting, treasury operations, management of public deposits, and financial control of public expenditure.
Gestion financière de l’État hors fiscal.b: Direction générale des Finances publiques (DGFiP), public accountants

Agence de l’environnement et de la maîtr.d: Subsidy to ADEME, the French Agency for Ecological Transition, funding programs in waste management, energy efficiency, renewable energy, air quality, soil remediation, and circular economy.
Agence de l’environnement et de la maîtr.b: Local authorities, businesses, and households via ADEME programs

Régime de retraite du personnel de la RA.d: State subsidy to balance the special pension regime for employees of Paris public transport operator RATP, ensuring long-term solvency of the retirement scheme.

Autres remboursements et dégrèvements li.d: Miscellaneous tax refunds and rebates related to state revenue management, including corrections, adjustments, and administrative refunds outside the main tax categories.
Autres remboursements et dégrèvements li.b: Taxpayers entitled to refunds or rebates

Recherches scientifiques et technologiqu.d: Public research funding for energy sciences and technologies, including nuclear energy, renewables, energy storage, hydrogen, and energy efficiency.
Recherches scientifiques et technologiqu.b: CEA, IFPEN, CNRS energy labs, and research partnerships

Protection juridique des majeurs.d: Legal protection services for vulnerable adults (guardianship, curatorship, judicial safeguards), funding professional guardians and the court-mandated protection system.
Protection juridique des majeurs.b: Vulnerable adults under legal protection and professional guardians (mandataires judiciaires)

Assurer la crédibilité technique de la d.d: Development, production, and maintenance of the M51 submarine-launched ballistic missile, the primary delivery system for France’s sea-based nuclear deterrent.
Assurer la crédibilité technique de la d.b: French Navy, DGA, and defense contractors (ArianeGroup)

Versements au fonds spécial de retraite.d: State contributions to the special retirement fund of the autonomous national social security fund for mines, covering pension obligations for former mining sector workers.
Versements au fonds spécial de retraite.b: Retired and former mining industry workers

Mise en oeuvre de l’enseignement dans le.d: Delivery of education in public secondary schools, covering teacher salaries, pedagogical resources, and operational costs of public collèges and lycées.
Mise en oeuvre de l’enseignement dans le.b: Students and teachers in public secondary education

Exonérations TEPA.d: Tax exemptions introduced by the TEPA law (Travail, Emploi, Pouvoir d’Achat) covering overtime pay exemptions from income tax and social contributions.

Politique des ressources humaines.d: Human resources policy for the Ministry of Defense, covering recruitment, career management, training, social dialogue, and working conditions for civilian and military personnel.
Politique des ressources humaines.b: Ministry of Defense civilian and military staff

Fonctions de soutien du ministère.d: Cross-cutting support functions of the Ministry of Justice including HR management, IT systems, budget execution, legal affairs, and general administration.
Fonctions de soutien du ministère.b: Ministry of Justice central and deconcentrated services
