Dispositifs mis en œuvre pour l’emploi d.d: Youth employment schemes administered by the public employment service (Pôle emploi/France Travail), including counseling, job placement, and specific integration measures for young jobseekers.

Logistique, système d’information, immob.d: Logistics, IT systems, and real estate management for the Ministry of Interior, covering building maintenance, information systems, fleet management, and shared services.
Logistique, système d’information, immob.b: Ministry of Interior services and police/gendarmerie facilities

Politique immobilière.d: State real estate policy covering the rationalization, maintenance, and management of government-owned buildings, including renovation, energy efficiency improvements, and strategic asset management.

Soutien à la création, à la production e.d: Support for the creation, production, and distribution of live performing arts including theater, dance, music, circus, and street arts, funding national venues, companies, and festivals.
Soutien à la création, à la production e.b: Performing arts companies, national theaters, festivals, and independent artists

Reconnaissance envers le monde combattan.d: Recognition and benefits for veterans and war victims, covering military disability pensions, the reversion pension for widows, and various entitlements acknowledging military service.
Reconnaissance envers le monde combattan.b: Veterans, war invalids, war widows, and orphans

PMI, droits et soutien aux invalides.d: Military disability pensions (Pensions Militaires d’Invalidité), rights, and support services for disabled veterans and war victims, including medical care and social assistance.
PMI, droits et soutien aux invalides.b: Disabled veterans and civilian war victims

Sécurité routière.d: Road safety policy including regulation, awareness campaigns, driver licensing, vehicle certification, and coordination of road safety measures across government agencies.
Sécurité routière.b: Road users, driving schools, and local road safety stakeholders

Accélération de la croissance (fonds pro.d: Equity investments through the France 2030 investment plan to accelerate growth in strategic sectors including deeptech, health, energy, and advanced manufacturing.
Accélération de la croissance (fonds pro.b: Innovative startups and growth-stage companies in strategic sectors

Sécurité routière - hors administration.d: Road safety operations outside central administration, covering local implementation of road safety measures, speed enforcement, infrastructure improvements, and accident prevention at the territorial level.
Sécurité routière - hors administration.b: Departmental and local road safety offices and road users

Pilotage territorial des politiques gouv.d: Territorial steering of government policies by prefectures and sub-prefectures, coordinating interministerial action at the departmental and regional level.
Pilotage territorial des politiques gouv.b: Prefectures, sub-prefectures, and local government partners

Formation des personnels enseignants et.d: Training of teaching staff and educational guidance counselors in secondary education, covering initial preparation and continuing professional development.
Formation des personnels enseignants et.b: Secondary school teachers and guidance counselors (conseillers d’orientation)

Charges nucléaires de long terme des ins.d: Long-term nuclear liabilities of CEA facilities, covering decommissioning costs, nuclear waste management, and environmental remediation of atomic energy commission sites.
Charges nucléaires de long terme des ins.b: CEA (Commissariat à l’énergie atomique) and affected communities

Réseau diplomatique.d: France’s diplomatic network of embassies, consulates, and permanent representations abroad, covering operational costs, personnel, security, and building maintenance of diplomatic posts worldwide.
Réseau diplomatique.b: French embassies, consulates, and diplomatic staff

Régimes de retraite et de sécurité socia.d: Special pension and social security regime for maritime workers (ENIM), covering retirement pensions, health insurance, and occupational accident benefits for seafarers.
Régimes de retraite et de sécurité socia.b: Active and retired sailors, fishermen, and merchant marine workers

Régimes de retraite et de sécurité socia.d: Continuation of state subsidies to the special social security regime for maritime workers ensuring the financial balance of ENIM pension and health coverage funds.
Régimes de retraite et de sécurité socia.b: Active and retired sailors, fishermen, and merchant marine workers

Financement structurel des écosystèmes d.d: Structural funding for innovation ecosystems including technology transfer offices, incubators, accelerators, competitiveness clusters (pôles de compétitivité), and innovation support networks.
Financement structurel des écosystèmes d.b: Innovation clusters, incubators, technology transfer organizations, and startups

Contribution à l’équipement des collecti.d: Capital grants to local authorities for improving public transport infrastructure, road safety equipment, and traffic management systems.
Contribution à l’équipement des collecti.b: Municipalities and intercommunal bodies investing in public transport

Contribution à l’équipement des collecti.d: Additional allocation for local authority transport, safety, and road infrastructure equipment, complementing the main grant program.
Contribution à l’équipement des collecti.b: Municipalities and intercommunal bodies investing in transport infrastructure

État-major et services centraux.d: General staff and central services of the Ministry of Defense, covering strategic planning, interservice coordination, central administration, and ministerial support functions.
État-major et services centraux.b: Ministry of Defense general staff, directorates, and central services

Prêts du Trésor à des États étrangers (c.d: Treasury loans to foreign governments to facilitate the sale of French goods and services abroad, supporting French export competitiveness in strategic markets.
Prêts du Trésor à des États étrangers (c.b: Foreign governments and French exporters of capital goods and services

Prêts à des États étrangers (commerce ex.d: Additional line for concessional loans to foreign states aimed at promoting French foreign trade, particularly in infrastructure, defense, and industrial equipment.
Prêts à des États étrangers (commerce ex.b: Foreign governments and French companies in international trade

Soutien (autres dépenses).d: Miscellaneous support expenditures covering cross-cutting operational costs that do not fall under specific program actions, including general administration overhead.
Soutien (autres dépenses).b: Various government departments requiring cross-cutting support

Assurer la crédibilité technique de la d.d: Development of the third-generation nuclear-powered ballistic missile submarine (SNLE 3G) to replace the current Triomphant-class submarines as the backbone of France’s sea-based nuclear deterrent.
Assurer la crédibilité technique de la d.b: French Navy, DGA, Naval Group, and defense supply chain

Fonds de solidarité pour le développemen.d: Development solidarity fund financed by the tax on airline tickets and financial transaction tax, channeled primarily through multilateral health and climate initiatives (Global Fund, UNITAID).
Fonds de solidarité pour le développemen.b: Developing countries via multilateral development and health organizations

Fonds de solidarité pour le développemen.d: Additional allocation to the development solidarity fund supporting international initiatives against pandemics, climate change, and poverty in developing nations.
Fonds de solidarité pour le développemen.b: International development organizations and beneficiary countries

Développement des postes, des télécommun.d: Development of postal services, telecommunications, and digital infrastructure including broadband deployment, digital inclusion programs, and postal service modernization.
Développement des postes, des télécommun.b: La Poste, telecom operators, and rural/underserved communities

Fonctionnement des établissements.d: Operating costs of public higher education establishments including universities, covering non-personnel expenses such as utilities, maintenance, equipment, and teaching materials.
Fonctionnement des établissements.b: Public universities and higher education institutions

Recherche et exploitation du renseigneme.d: Personnel costs for the DGSE (General Directorate for External Security) staff working on intelligence collection and analysis relevant to France’s national security.

Santé scolaire.d: School health services providing medical examinations, health screenings, vaccination follow-up, psychological support, and health education to pupils in primary and secondary schools.
Santé scolaire.b: Students in public schools, school nurses, and school physicians

Mise en oeuvre des enseignements dans le.d: State funding for teaching in private schools under contract (sous contrat), covering teacher salaries in private institutions that follow the national curriculum.
Mise en oeuvre des enseignements dans le.b: Teachers and students in private schools under state contract

Assurer la crédibilité technique de la d.d: Nuclear weapons simulation program replacing live nuclear testing, using supercomputers (TERA), laser facilities (LMJ), and radiographic installations to maintain warhead reliability.
Assurer la crédibilité technique de la d.b: CEA-DAM (military applications division), defense research labs

Enregistrement, timbre, autres contribut.d: Tax rebates and refunds on registration duties, stamp duties, and miscellaneous indirect taxes, including correction of amounts unduly collected by the state.
Enregistrement, timbre, autres contribut.b: Taxpayers entitled to refunds on registration and stamp duties

Personnels œuvrant pour les politiques d.d: Personnel costs for civil servants implementing urban planning, territorial development, and housing policies in decentralized ministry offices.
Personnels œuvrant pour les politiques d.b: Ministry staff in DDT(M) offices working on urban planning and housing

Charge de la dette de SNCF Réseau repris.d: State assumption of SNCF Réseau’s historical debt service, following the 2020 rail reform that transferred EUR 25 billion of railway network debt to the state budget.

Politique de l’internat et établissement.b: Students in state boarding schools and excellence internats

Logistique (separate).d: Logistics operations covering supply chain management, warehousing, distribution, fleet management, and material support for a specific ministry or program.
Logistique (separate).b: Ministry logistics services and supported operational units

Coordination de la politique numérique.d: Coordination of national digital policy through DINUM (interministerial digital directorate), covering digital government strategy, open data, state platforms (FranceConnect), and IT standards.
Coordination de la politique numérique.b: DINUM and all government digital transformation efforts

Espace - Commander et conduire - OMEGA.d: OMEGA military space command and control system providing situational awareness and coordination capabilities for French space operations and space defense.
Espace - Commander et conduire - OMEGA.b: Commandement de l’Espace (CDE) and military space operations

Construction locative et amélioration du.d: Social housing construction and existing housing stock improvement, covering state subsidies for new social housing (PLAI, PLUS, PLS) and renovation of degraded social housing.
Construction locative et amélioration du.b: Social housing organizations (HLM), tenants, and ANRU

Fonds pour la transformation de l’action.d: Public Action Transformation Fund financing innovative government modernization projects that generate efficiency gains, improve public services, or enable digital transformation.

Indemnisation des victimes des persécuti.d: Compensation for victims of antisemitic persecution and acts of barbarism during World War II, providing reparation payments to survivors and their heirs.
Indemnisation des victimes des persécuti.b: Holocaust survivors, WWII victims of barbarism, and their descendants

Université Gustave Eiffel.d: Subsidy to Université Gustave Eiffel, a research university specializing in urban futures, transport, infrastructure, and sustainable cities, formed from IFSTTAR and other institutes.
Université Gustave Eiffel.b: Université Gustave Eiffel, its researchers and students

Actions sociales en faveur des élèves.d: Social welfare programs for students including school meal subsidies, social funds for families in difficulty, school supply grants, and emergency financial aid for pupils.
Actions sociales en faveur des élèves.b: Disadvantaged students and their families in public schools

Engagements financiers de l'État.d: Mission covering the French State's financial commitments: sovereign debt service, state guarantees, and management of structured financial risks.
Engagements financiers de l'État.b: The French State as borrower and guarantor. Indirectly benefits all citizens through maintained financial credibility.

Prêts et avances à divers services de l'.d: Special Treasury account providing loans and advances to State agencies and public service organizations, including EU agricultural subsidy pre-financing.
Prêts et avances à divers services de l'.b: State agencies and public service bodies requiring Treasury cash advances for operations.

Participations financières de l'État.d: Mission managing the State's equity participations in enterprises through the Agence des Participations de l'État (APE), including capital operations and strategic investments.
Participations financières de l'État.b: State-owned enterprises and strategic companies (EDF, SNCF, La Poste, etc.), and the broader economy.

Avances à l'audiovisuel public.d: Special Treasury account funding French public broadcasting: France Télévisions, Radio France, Arte France, France Médias Monde, and INA.
Avances à l'audiovisuel public.b: French public broadcasting organizations and their audiences across television, radio, and digital platforms.

Gestion du patrimoine immobilier de l'Ét.d: Special account managing the State's real estate portfolio: building operations, maintenance, energy efficiency, and property transactions.
Gestion du patrimoine immobilier de l'Ét.b: Government ministries and agencies occupying State buildings, and taxpayers through more efficient real estate management.

Administration générale et territoriale.d: Mission funding territorial administration through prefectures and sub-prefectures, national identity documents, elections organization, and internal affairs.
Administration générale et territoriale.b: All citizens interacting with prefectures for documents, permits, registration, and elections.

Financement des aides aux collectivités.d: Special account financing aid to local authorities for rural electrification, grid reinforcement, and renewable energy in non-interconnected zones.
Financement des aides aux collectivités.b: Rural communities investing in electrical infrastructure and overseas territory residents.

Direction de l'action du Gouvernement.d: Mission funding the Prime Minister's services and cross-governmental coordination: SGDSN (defense/security), DINUM (digital), ANSSI (cybersecurity), and inter-ministerial delegations.
Direction de l'action du Gouvernement.b: The government coordination apparatus and indirectly all citizens through cybersecurity and digital services.

Conseil et contrôle de l'État.d: Mission funding advisory and oversight bodies: Conseil d'État (supreme administrative court), Cour des comptes (audit court), and CESE.
Conseil et contrôle de l'État.b: Citizens seeking administrative justice, government bodies receiving legal advice, and taxpayers benefiting from audit oversight.

Action extérieure de l'État.d: Mission funding France's foreign affairs: diplomatic network (embassies, consulates), cultural diplomacy, and consular services.
Action extérieure de l'État.b: French nationals abroad, foreign students and cultural audiences, and international diplomatic partners.

Remboursements et dégrèvements d'impôts.d: Refunds and tax relief on national taxes (VAT credits, income tax refunds, corporate tax refunds, research tax credit). The largest single budget programme by volume.
Remboursements et dégrèvements d'impôts.b: Taxpayers receiving refunds of overpaid taxes, VAT credit reimbursements, and tax credit beneficiaries.

Remboursements et dégrèvements d'impôts.d: Refunds and relief on local taxes (property tax exemptions, housing tax adjustments, local tax caps). The State compensates local authorities for mandated relief.
Remboursements et dégrèvements d'impôts.b: Local taxpayers with property tax caps, elderly and low-income households, and local authorities.

Avances aux collectivités et établisseme.d: Treasury advances to local authorities and public establishments, primarily monthly advances on shared tax revenue before final settlement.
Avances aux collectivités et établisseme.b: Regions, departments, municipalities receiving advance payments on national tax revenue shares.

Pensions civiles et militaires de retrai.d: Civil service and military retirement pensions and temporary disability allowances. The largest pensions programme, covering millions of retired public servants.
Pensions civiles et militaires de retrai.b: Retired civil servants and military personnel, and active employees with disability allowances.

Ouvriers des établissements industriels.d: Retirement pensions for workers of State industrial establishments (FSPOEIE), covering defense factories, arsenals, and other State industrial facilities.
Ouvriers des établissements industriels.b: Retired workers from State industrial establishments, primarily in the defense sector.

Pensions militaires d'invalidité et des.d: Military disability pensions, war victim pensions, and legacy State pensions (colonial administrators, Alsace-Moselle regime).
Pensions militaires d'invalidité et des.b: Disabled military veterans, war victims and dependents, and recipients of legacy pension schemes.

Charge de la dette et trésorerie de l'Ét.d: Interest payments on French sovereign debt (OATs, BTFs, inflation-linked bonds) and Treasury cash management, managed by Agence France Tresor.
Charge de la dette et trésorerie de l'Ét.b: Holders of French government bonds. Indirectly, all citizens depend on sustainable debt management.

Amortissement de la dette de l'État liée.d: Repayment of additional sovereign debt from the COVID-19 crisis, funded through social contribution revenues transferred to CADES.
Amortissement de la dette de l'État liée.b: The French State and future taxpayers, through reduced pandemic-era debt burden.

Appels en garantie de l'État (crédits év.d: Payments when State guarantees are called upon (export credit via BPI, business loan guarantees, international financial institution guarantees).
Appels en garantie de l'État (crédits év.b: Beneficiaries of State-guaranteed loans when defaults occur, including exporters and businesses.

Charge de la dette de SNCF Réseau repris.d: Interest on SNCF Reseau debt assumed by the State in 2020 as part of railway reform (approximately EUR 25 billion of rail infrastructure debt).
Charge de la dette de SNCF Réseau repris.b: SNCF Reseau relieved of legacy debt, enabling greater investment in rail network modernization.

Fonds de soutien relatif aux prêts et co.d: Support fund helping local authorities exit toxic structured financial products (primarily Dexia-era loans with foreign currency indexation).
Fonds de soutien relatif aux prêts et co.b: Local authorities exposed to high-risk structured loans needing restructuring assistance.

Gestion fiscale et financière de l'État.d: Funds the DGFiP: tax collection, public accounting, land registry (cadastre), and financial management for State and local governments.
Gestion fiscale et financière de l'État.b: All taxpayers, local authorities receiving accounting services, and property owners using cadastral records.

Avances à l'Agence de services et de pai.d: Treasury advances to the ASP for pre-financing EU Common Agricultural Policy subsidies before European Commission reimbursement.
Avances à l'Agence de services et de pai.b: French farmers awaiting CAP payments, receiving timely payments through State pre-financing.

Prêts et avances à des services de l'Éta.d: Loans and cash advances to State services with autonomous budgets for temporary cash flow management.
Prêts et avances à des services de l'Éta.b: State services requiring temporary Treasury financing for operations.

Avances à des organismes distincts de l'.d: Treasury advances to public service organizations legally distinct from the State for temporary financing needs.
Avances à des organismes distincts de l'.b: Public establishments and agencies managing public services requiring cash advances.

Prêts à FranceAgriMer au titre des préfi.d: Loans to FranceAgriMer for pre-financing European fund programs, particularly wine sector and agricultural market interventions.
Prêts à FranceAgriMer au titre des préfi.b: French agricultural producers benefiting from EU-funded market support via FranceAgriMer.

Avances à l'Office national d'indemnisat.d: Treasury advances to ONIAM for compensating victims of Benfluorex (Mediator), withdrawn in 2009 after causing serious heart valve damage.
Avances à l'Office national d'indemnisat.b: Victims of Benfluorex (Mediator) seeking compensation for cardiac valve disease.

Désendettement de l'État et d'établissem.d: Uses proceeds from State asset sales (privatizations, equity disposals) to reduce public debt of the State and establishments.
Désendettement de l'État et d'établissem.b: The French State and taxpayers, through reduced debt burden from asset sale proceeds.

Opérations en capital intéressant les pa.d: State equity capital operations: acquiring strategic company stakes, recapitalizing State-owned enterprises, managed through the APE.
Opérations en capital intéressant les pa.b: Strategic companies receiving State capital and State-owned enterprises being recapitalized.

Régimes de retraite des mines, de la SEI.d: Legacy pension regimes for former miners, SEITA (tobacco monopoly) workers, and other closed special pension schemes.
Régimes de retraite des mines, de la SEI.b: Retired miners, former SEITA employees, and beneficiaries of historical special regimes.

France Médias Monde.d: France's international broadcasting: France 24 (TV in French/English/Arabic/Spanish), RFI (radio), and Monte Carlo Doualiya.
France Médias Monde.b: International audiences of French public media worldwide and French-speaking communities abroad.

Institut national de l'audiovisuel.d: INA preserves, digitizes, and makes accessible France's audiovisual heritage spanning decades of radio and television archives.
Institut national de l'audiovisuel.b: Researchers, media professionals, educators, and the public accessing France's audiovisual archives.

Renforcement des fonds propres de l'Agen.d: Equity capital to AFD, strengthening its balance sheet to expand development finance to developing countries.
Renforcement des fonds propres de l'Agen.b: Developing countries receiving AFD-financed projects in Africa, Asia, and the Pacific.

Cohésion.d: Plan de Relance component focused on social and territorial cohesion: employment support, training, social inclusion, and territorial development.
Cohésion.b: Workers in retraining, unemployed in insertion programs, and territories receiving recovery investment.

Prêts du Trésor à des États étrangers en.d: Treasury loans to foreign governments to facilitate purchase of French goods and services, supporting export strategy.
Prêts du Trésor à des États étrangers en.b: Foreign governments purchasing French goods and French exporters in infrastructure and defense.

Prêts à des États étrangers pour consoli.d: Debt consolidation loans to foreign states through Paris Club rescheduling agreements for heavily indebted countries.
Prêts à des États étrangers pour consoli.b: Heavily indebted developing countries receiving rescheduling for sustainable repayment.

Prêts à l'Agence française de développem.d: Concessional loans through AFD for economic and social development in partner countries, primarily sub-Saharan Africa.
Prêts à l'Agence française de développem.b: Developing countries receiving development loans for infrastructure, climate, and governance.

Désendettement de l'État.d: Share of automated traffic fine revenue dedicated to State debt reduction, as mandated by law.
Désendettement de l'État.b: The French State and taxpayers through marginal debt reduction from fine revenues.

Performance et résilience des bâtiments.d: Energy efficiency renovations and resilience improvements for State buildings, part of ecological transition for public real estate.
Performance et résilience des bâtiments.b: Government employees in improved buildings and the environment through reduced energy consumption.

Opérations immobilières et entretien des.d: Real estate transactions and maintenance of State-owned buildings through the special real estate account.
Opérations immobilières et entretien des.b: Government agencies in State buildings requiring renovation or maintenance.

Prêts pour le développement économique e.d: Treasury loans to private individuals and organizations for economic and social development purposes.
Prêts pour le développement économique e.b: Private organizations and individuals receiving development loans.

Prêts et avances pour le logement des ag.d: Housing loans and advances to State employees, particularly in high-cost areas like Paris and overseas territories.
Prêts et avances pour le logement des ag.b: Civil servants and their families receiving housing assistance loans.

Vie de l'élève.d: Student life support: school health services, social assistance, scholarships (bourses), guidance, and anti-bullying measures.
Vie de l'élève.b: School students benefiting from health services, scholarships, social workers, and wellbeing programs.

Soutien de la politique de l'éducation n.d: Cross-cutting education support: IT systems, HR management, statistical services (DEPP), evaluation, and administrative overhead.
Soutien de la politique de l'éducation n.b: The public education system through centralized support functions.

Aide à l'accès au logement.d: Housing access aid, primarily the State contribution to FNAL financing APL, ALF, and ALS housing allowances.
Aide à l'accès au logement.b: Low and moderate-income households receiving housing allowances (about 6 million households).

Urbanisme, territoires et amélioration d.d: Urban planning, ANAH renovation subsidies (MaPrimeRenov), social housing construction, and building regulation.
Urbanisme, territoires et amélioration d.b: Homeowners renovating properties, social housing operators, and improved neighborhoods.

Impulsion et coordination de la politiqu.d: Territorial development via ANCT: rural revitalization, Action Coeur de Ville town center programs, and territorial contracts.
Impulsion et coordination de la politiqu.b: Rural communities and mid-sized cities in territorial development programs.

Conduite et pilotage des politiques de l.d: Cross-cutting support for Ministry of Ecological Transition: staff, IT, legal services, and administrative coordination.
Conduite et pilotage des politiques de l.b: Ministry staff enabling ecological transition policies.

Fonds d'accélération de la transition éc.d: Green fund financing local projects for energy renovation, biodiversity, circular economy, and climate adaptation.
Fonds d'accélération de la transition éc.b: Local authorities implementing ecological transition projects and their residents.

Soutien aux prestations de l'aviation ci.d: Civil aviation services: air navigation operations, safety oversight, and airport infrastructure via DGAC.
Soutien aux prestations de l'aviation ci.b: Airlines and passengers benefiting from air traffic control and safety.

Transports aériens, surveillance et cert.d: Air transport regulation, aircraft certification, flight safety investigations (BEA), and economic regulation.
Transports aériens, surveillance et cert.b: Airlines, aircraft manufacturers, and passengers benefiting from aviation safety.

Contribution à l'équipement des collecti.d: Share of traffic fine revenue distributed to local authorities for public transport, road safety, and traffic improvements.
Contribution à l'équipement des collecti.b: Local authorities investing in public transport and road safety.

Prêts à la société concessionnaire de la.d: State loans to CDG Express concession company building the direct Paris-CDG Airport rail link.
Prêts à la société concessionnaire de la.b: Future CDG Express passengers and air travelers seeking faster airport access.

Administration territoriale de l'État.d: Prefectures, sub-prefectures, and staff implementing government policy locally and providing citizen services.
Administration territoriale de l'État.b: Citizens accessing identity documents, residence permits, and local governance.

Conduite et pilotage des politiques de l.d: Cross-cutting Interior Ministry support: administration, IT (ANTS for digital documents), legal affairs, and communication.
Conduite et pilotage des politiques de l.b: Ministry staff, citizens using digital services, and Interior ministry operations.

Contrôle et modernisation de la politiqu.d: Automated traffic enforcement (speed cameras), driver's license points system, and traffic/parking policy modernization.
Contrôle et modernisation de la politiqu.b: Road users benefiting from safety enforcement and the points-based license system.

Accompagnement des mutations économiques.d: Economic transition support: subsidized contracts, apprenticeship incentives, professional training, and restructuring aid.
Accompagnement des mutations économiques.b: Workers in transition, apprentices and employers, businesses receiving hiring subsidies.

Accès et retour à l'emploi.d: Job access and return-to-work: France Travail budget, insertion programs, subsidized contracts (PEC), missions locales.
Accès et retour à l'emploi.b: Job seekers, youth in missions locales, and long-term unemployed in insertion programs.

Conception, gestion et évaluation des po.d: Ministry of Labor cross-cutting support: policy design, statistical analysis (DARES), evaluation, and administration.
Conception, gestion et évaluation des po.b: Ministry staff, policymakers using DARES statistics, and employment programs.

Amélioration de la qualité de l'emploi e.d: Labor inspection, workplace health and safety, social dialogue, and working conditions improvement.
Amélioration de la qualité de l'emploi e.b: Workers benefiting from labor inspection and unions/employers in social dialogue.

Service public de l'énergie.d: Public energy service obligations: regulated tariffs, energy transition, and solidarity for vulnerable households.
Service public de l'énergie.b: Energy consumers, households with energy vouchers (cheque-energie), and the energy sector.

Recherche dans les domaines de l'énergie.d: Research funding for CEA (nuclear/renewable), IFPEN, IFREMER (marine), and Meteo-France.
Recherche dans les domaines de l'énergie.b: Research organizations and society through energy and environmental innovation.

Opérations de maîtrise de la demande d'é.d: Electricity demand management and renewable energy in non-interconnected overseas territories.
Opérations de maîtrise de la demande d'é.b: Residents and businesses in overseas territories with renewable energy development.

Financement structurel des écosystèmes d.d: France 2030 structural financing: technology transfer, deeptech incubators, innovation competitions, strategic investments.
Financement structurel des écosystèmes d.b: Startups, deeptech companies, and research labs receiving France 2030 funding.

Soutien des progrès de l'enseignement et.d: France 2030 funding for higher education excellence: university modernization, research equipment, digital campuses.
Soutien des progrès de l'enseignement et.b: Universities, research institutions, students, and researchers.

Conseil d'État et autres juridictions ad.d: Conseil d'Etat (supreme administrative court) and the network of administrative courts and appellate courts.
Conseil d'État et autres juridictions ad.b: Citizens seeking administrative justice and government bodies receiving legal opinions.

Conseil économique, social et environnem.d: CESE, France's third constitutional assembly representing organized civil society, issuing opinions on legislation.
Conseil économique, social et environnem.b: Civil society organizations, policymakers, and citizens in public consultations.

Régimes de retraite et de sécurité socia.d: ENIM social security and pension regime for seafarers, one of France's oldest social protection schemes.
Régimes de retraite et de sécurité socia.b: Active and retired seafarers: fishermen, merchant mariners, shellfish farmers.

Édition et diffusion.d: DILA: publishing the Journal Officiel, managing service-public.fr and Legifrance for administrative information.
Édition et diffusion.b: Citizens and businesses accessing legal texts, guidance, and official publications.

Interventions territoriales de l'État.d: Specific territorial intervention plans: Corsica development, Seine water quality, Marais Poitevin restoration.
Interventions territoriales de l'État.b: Residents of targeted territories with specific State intervention plans.

Prêts octroyés dans le cadre des program.d: Repayable advances and loans to innovative businesses under PIA/France 2030 in strategic sectors.
Prêts octroyés dans le cadre des program.b: Innovative companies receiving repayable State financing for R&D and industrialization.

Compétitivité et durabilité de l'agricul.d: Agricultural competitiveness and sustainability: farm modernization, agro-ecological transition, forest management.
Compétitivité et durabilité de l'agricul.b: Farmers, forest owners, food processing businesses, and rural communities.

Sécurité et qualité sanitaires de l'alim.d: Food safety: veterinary and phytosanitary controls, animal health surveillance, food inspection, and ANSES.
Sécurité et qualité sanitaires de l'alim.b: Consumers benefiting from food safety, livestock farmers, and the food industry.

Conduite et pilotage des politiques de l.d: Ministry of Agriculture support: staff, agricultural education (lycees agricoles), IT, and administration.
Conduite et pilotage des politiques de l.b: Ministry staff, agricultural education students, and the agricultural sector.

Soutien aux associations de protection a.d: Financial support to animal protection associations and shelters for abandoned and mistreated animals.
Soutien aux associations de protection a.b: Animal protection associations, shelters, and communities.

Recherche appliquée et innovation en agr.d: Applied agricultural research: INRAE partnerships, technical institute projects, farm-level innovation.
Recherche appliquée et innovation en agr.b: Farmers adopting innovations, technical institutes, and INRAE researchers.

Développement et transfert en agricultur.d: Agricultural knowledge transfer: chambers of agriculture advisory, farmer training, and extension.
Développement et transfert en agricultur.b: Farmers receiving advisory services, young farmers, and rural communities.

Diplomatie culturelle et d'influence.d: French cultural diplomacy: Institut Francais, Alliance Francaise, schools abroad (AEFE), Campus France.
Diplomatie culturelle et d'influence.b: International students, French school students abroad, and foreign cultural audiences.

Français à l'étranger et affaires consul.d: Consular services: protection, civil registration, overseas elections, visas, and social assistance.
Français à l'étranger et affaires consul.b: French nationals at consulates abroad, visa applicants, and overseas voters.

Solidarité à l'égard des pays en dévelop.d: Development solidarity: bilateral aid, multilateral fund contributions, humanitarian aid, health programs.
Solidarité à l'égard des pays en dévelop.b: Populations in developing countries, particularly sub-Saharan Africa.

\"Restitution des \"\"biens mal acquis\".d: Restitution of ill-gotten assets from confiscated foreign leaders' assets to benefit populations of origin.
\"Restitution des \"\"biens mal acquis\".b: Populations of countries whose leaders had assets confiscated in France.

Compensation à la Sécurité sociale du co.d: Compensates Social Security for vaccine donations and channels EU Recovery Facility funds for Segur health investments.
Compensation à la Sécurité sociale du co.b: Social Security system and hospitals benefiting from EU-funded modernization.

Innovation et transformation numériques.d: Digital transformation of public administration: DINUM projects, FranceConnect, data.gouv.fr, inter-ministerial services.
Innovation et transformation numériques.b: Citizens and businesses accessing digital public services and agencies with shared infrastructure.

Remboursements et restitutions liés à la.d: Sub-action within Remboursements et dégrèvements d'impôts d'État (crédits évaluatifs): Remboursements et restitutions liés à la mécanique de l'impôt.
Remboursements et restitutions liés à la.b: Beneficiaries of the Remboursements et dégrèvements d'impôts d'État (crédits évaluatifs) programme.

Remboursements et dégrèvements liés à la.d: Sub-action within Remboursements et dégrèvements d'impôts d'État (crédits évaluatifs): Remboursements et dégrèvements liés à la gestion des produits de l'Etat.
Remboursements et dégrèvements liés à la.b: Beneficiaries of the Remboursements et dégrèvements d'impôts d'État (crédits évaluatifs) programme.

Admission en non valeur d'impôts locaux.d: Sub-action within Admission en non valeur d'impôts locaux: Admission en non valeur d'impôts locaux.
Admission en non valeur d'impôts locaux.b: Beneficiaries of the Admission en non valeur d'impôts locaux programme.

Taxe d'habitation.d: Housing/urban sub-action: Taxe d'habitation. Part of Taxe d'habitation.
Taxe d'habitation.b: Residents, tenants, and communities benefiting from housing policy.

Avances aux régions sur les frais de ges.d: Sub-action within Avances sur le montant des impositions revenant aux régions, départements, communes, établissements et divers organismes: Avances aux régions sur les frais de gestion de la contribution foncière des entreprises (CFE) et de la contribution sur la valeur ajoutée des entreprises (CVAE) et sur le produit de la taxe intérieure de consommation sur les produits énergétiques (TICPE).
Avances aux régions sur les frais de ges.b: Beneficiaries of the Avances sur le montant des impositions revenant aux régions, départements, communes, établissements et divers organismes programme.

Avances de l'article L. 2337-1 du code g.d: Sub-action within Avances aux collectivités et établissements publics, et à la Nouvelle-Calédonie: Avances de l'article L. 2337-1 du code général des collectivités territoriales.
Avances de l'article L. 2337-1 du code g.b: Beneficiaries of the Avances aux collectivités et établissements publics, et à la Nouvelle-Calédonie programme.

Allocations temporaires d'invalidité.d: Defence sub-action within Pensions civiles et militaires de retraite et allocations temporaires d'invalidité. Allocations temporaires d'invalidité.
Allocations temporaires d'invalidité.b: Armed forces personnel and national defence capabilities.

Rentes accidents du travail des ouvriers.d: Sub-action within Ouvriers des établissements industriels de l'État: Rentes accidents du travail des ouvriers civils des établissements militaires (RATOCEM).
Rentes accidents du travail des ouvriers.b: Beneficiaries of the Ouvriers des établissements industriels de l'État programme.

Gestion du régime.d: Sub-action within Ouvriers des établissements industriels de l'État: Gestion du régime.
Gestion du régime.b: Beneficiaries of the Ouvriers des établissements industriels de l'État programme.

Autres dépenses spécifiques.d: Sub-action within Ouvriers des établissements industriels de l'État: Autres dépenses spécifiques.
Autres dépenses spécifiques.b: Beneficiaries of the Ouvriers des établissements industriels de l'État programme.

Allocations de reconnaissance des ancien.d: Defence sub-action within Pensions militaires d'invalidité et des victimes de guerre et autres pensions. Allocations de reconnaissance des anciens supplétifs.
Allocations de reconnaissance des ancien.b: Armed forces personnel and national defence capabilities.

Pensions d'Alsace-Moselle.d: Defence sub-action within Pensions militaires d'invalidité et des victimes de guerre et autres pensions. Pensions d'Alsace-Moselle.
Pensions d'Alsace-Moselle.b: Armed forces personnel and national defence capabilities.

Pensions des sapeurs-pompiers et anciens.d: Defence sub-action within Pensions militaires d'invalidité et des victimes de guerre et autres pensions. Pensions des sapeurs-pompiers et anciens agents de la défense passive victimes d'accident.
Pensions des sapeurs-pompiers et anciens.b: Armed forces personnel and national defence capabilities.

Pensions de l'ORTF.d: Defence sub-action within Pensions militaires d'invalidité et des victimes de guerre et autres pensions. Pensions de l'ORTF.
Pensions de l'ORTF.b: Armed forces personnel and national defence capabilities.

Pensions des anciens agents du chemin de.d: Defence sub-action within Pensions militaires d'invalidité et des victimes de guerre et autres pensions. Pensions des anciens agents du chemin de fer franco-éthiopien.
Pensions des anciens agents du chemin de.b: Armed forces personnel and national defence capabilities.

Développement international de l'économi.d: Sub-action within Stratégies économiques: Développement international de l'économie française.
Développement international de l'économi.b: Beneficiaries of the Stratégies économiques programme.

Soutien au domaine social, logement, san.d: Sub-action within Appels en garantie de l'État (crédits évaluatifs): Soutien au domaine social, logement, santé.
Soutien au domaine social, logement, san.b: Beneficiaries of the Appels en garantie de l'État (crédits évaluatifs) programme.

Agriculture et environnement.d: Sub-action within Appels en garantie de l'État (crédits évaluatifs): Agriculture et environnement.
Agriculture et environnement.b: Beneficiaries of the Appels en garantie de l'État (crédits évaluatifs) programme.
